subcodes.first_line: Our illustrious and valorous namesake subdued the world by the might of his sword. Now thou too must [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تهمتنا همنامت دلیر و شیرگیر بود و جهانرا بضرب شمشیر تسخیر نمود حال تو نیز باید
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the power of words; of speech, @The Holy Spirit
